series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by corporations who are holding companies of Public Utilities, insurance Companies and Financial Institutions for filing and paying their Ohio Corporation Franchise Tax. This is one-part form and is input to our computer and filed in our corporate file room. It is filed annually and is due between January 31 and March 31 of each year unless the taxpayer files the necessary extension.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in files four (4) years from due date and
